profiles.name: Rich general travel
profiles.summary: Richer general travel landscape baseline with protected highlights, natural midtone density, restrained global saturation, and Camera ST color energy.
use_when: Grasslands, roads, towns, open scenery, and mixed weather scenes that need a polished but believable travel-photo look
avoid_when: Dedicated bright flower/lavender fields that need the flower-field learned direction
Delicate portraits where Camera PT and softer presence controls are safer

profiles.name: Bright flower field travel
profiles.summary: Learned flower-field direction with stronger highlight protection, much more shadow recovery, softer contrast, controlled blue HSL, subtle vignette, and stronger calibration color energy.
use_when: Lavender or flower-field travel scenes with sky, distant mountains, field rows, and strong location context
Bright outdoor flower scenes where the final look should be airy, colorful, and polished
avoid_when: Portraits or already oversaturated close-up flower/bee frames

profiles.name: Sairim Lake east open travel
profiles.cn_name: 赛里木湖东岸开阔旅行
profiles.summary: Restrained lake/open-travel calibration for blue water, sky, and open grassland edges without pushing the scene into synthetic saturation.
use_when: Open lake and sky scenes with blue/cyan separation needs
Sairim Lake east-side travel frames or similar water-and-grassland scenes
avoid_when: Dense purple flower fields that need flower-rich

profiles.name: Bayanbulak nine-bends grassland
profiles.summary: Grassland and winding-river direction with grounded greens, protected highlights, and restrained color separation for broad Xinjiang meadow scenes.
use_when: Bayanbulak nine-bends and similar grassland river scenes
Broad green/yellow meadow landscapes where color should stay grounded
avoid_when: Snow/mountain or night/city scenes that need separate learned directions
